and 10 houses strong and posited in Kendras or Konas, the
subject will be very fortunate, wealthy, happy, virtuous and a
king.
Bhaskarayoga : If Mercury is in the 2nd house from the
Sun, if the Moon is in the 11 th house from Mercury and if
Jupiter is in a Kona with reference to the Moon, the resulting
Yoga is called Bhdskara. For example let us suppose that the
Moon is in Pisces. Then the Sun should be in Aries, Mercury
in Taurus and Jupiter either in Cancer or in Scorpio. Effects :
The person concerned will be a hero, equal to a king, handsome,
well-versed in Sastras, wealthy, expert in music, brave, competent
and proficient in mathematics.
Indrayoga : If Mars is posited in the 3rd house from the
Moon, Saturn in the 7th from Mars, Venus in the 7th from
Saturn and Jupiter in the 7th from Venus, the resulting yoga
is called Indra. In this Yoga Mars and Venus would be together
with Jupiter and Saturn in opposition.
